headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 20, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants fell short in Washington, losing 0-3 to the Nationals. Curtis Mead led the Giants' offense with a home run and two RBIs. In other action, the Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. The Tampa Bay Rays have transferred right-handed pitcher Michael Grove from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder surgery. The Rays have also placed right-handed pitcher Mason Englert on the 15-day injured list with right forearm tightness. The Houston Astros have transferred right-handed pitcher Cristian Javier from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a grade two right shoulder strain.

The Houston Astros have made a trade, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez. The Los Angeles Dodgers have traded right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles in exchange for right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets have traded left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks have traded right-handed pitcher Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Philadelphia Phillies have traded right-handed pitcher Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations and international bonus pool money.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Washington**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 0-3 loss to the Washington Nationals, with Curtis Mead leading the Giants' offense. Mead hit a home run and drove in two runs in the game.

top_news.title: **Pirates Take Down Rays 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall to Yankees in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees took control of the game with a strong performance, securing a 7-0 victory over the Kansas City Royals. Ryan Weathers led the way for the Yankees, pitching 7.1 innings with 8 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Fall to Guardians in 8-4 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles suffered a tough defeat at the hands of the Cleveland Guardians, who won 8-4. José Ramírez led the Guardians' offense with two home runs and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Fall Short in Boston**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox edged out the Detroit Tigers 8-6 in a closely contested matchup. Impact hitters for the Red Sox included Kevin McGonigle and Masataka Yoshida, while Riley Greene and Hao-Yu Lee led the Tigers' offense.

top_news.title: **Rays' Grove Shifted to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Tampa Bay Rays right-handed pitcher Michael Grove has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list. Grove underwent right shoulder surgery.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt from the New York Yankees.
